name: llm-math-reviewer
description: Evidence-driven verification workflow for reviewing mathematical papers.

interface.shortDescription: LLM-driven verification workflow for theorem papers.
interface.longDescription: Turns a large language model into a more disciplined reviewer for mathematical papers using explicit claims, obligation ledgers, adversarial checks, and closure rules.
defaultPrompt: Review this math paper and extract its core claims.
Build an obligation ledger for this theorem paper.
Check this proof for hidden assumptions or gaps.
